description_long: This object is a highly simplified, stylized representation of an airplane, featuring a smooth, rounded fuselage with no visible wings, tail, engines, or cockpit details. The surface is uniformly colored in a gradient of light blue and white, giving it a soft, cloud-like appearance. There are no discernible markings, windows, or structural features that typically define an aircraft. The overall shape is nearly spherical, lacking the elongated body and appendages of a conventional airplane. The finish appears matte and slightly diffuse, with no reflective or glossy elements. The object gives the impression of a minimalistic or abstract airplane model, possibly intended for decorative or conceptual use.
description: A smooth, nearly spherical, light blue and white object with no visible airplane features, resembling an abstract or minimalistic airplane form.
description_view_0: View 0 shows a rounded, light blue surface with subtle shading and no visible airplane features.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a similar smooth, blue-toned surface with slight gradient changes, maintaining the spherical appearance.
description_view_2: View 2 displays a lighter, almost white area dominating the surface, with minimal blue shading.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals a balanced mix of blue and white, with a soft gradient and no distinct airplane details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No visible wings or configuration details present.
attribute_tail_design: No visible tail or stabilizer configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit or window features.
